title: 3D Model
description:
A `digital-representation` constrained to real-time 3D model formats: glTF (binary or JSON),
Wavefront OBJ, or an OGC 3D Tiles tileset (D8.2 profile B).

mediaType.description: `model/gltf-binary` (.glb) or `model/gltf+json` (.gltf) for glTF 2.0, `model/obj` for Wavefront OBJ, or `application/json` for an OGC 3D Tiles tileset.
